assertions.title: Homepage renders all four judgment states including 观察中

steps.observed: Homepage loads with 今日判断 module

steps.expected: 4 rows: 值得跟, 观察中, 短热噪音, 需要补证据
steps.observed: 4 rows found with ids count-zhidegeng (0), count-guanchazu (0), count-duanrezaoyin (3), count-xuyaobuzhengju (4)
0+0+3+4 = 7 = total directions count
No JS errors

assertions.title: Direction detail reads product lines dynamically from data

steps.expected: Direction detail loads with streetwear product lines
steps.observed: Direction 廓形风格 loaded successfully

steps.expected: Product line cards show streetwear names (上装, 下装), not jade names
steps.observed: 2 cards found: 上装, 下装 — both are streetwear product lines

steps.action: Check for 暂无数据 text
steps.expected: No card shows 暂无数据
steps.observed: No 暂无数据 found; cards show opportunity/risk data

steps.action: Verify jade data shows jade product lines
steps.expected: Jade direction shows jade product lines
steps.observed: dir_001 with jade data shows 项链/吊坠, 耳饰, 戒指, 手串/叠戴
No JS errors

assertions.title: Direction detail handles invalid direction ID gracefully

steps.expected: Chinese error message with back link, no blank page
steps.observed: Page shows ⚠️ 方向未找到 with message '无法找到指定的方向 (ID: nonexistent)，请检查链接是否正确，或从首页重新选择方向。' and 返回首页 button
No JS errors

assertions.title: Jade dashboard still renders after changes

steps.observed: 9 direction rows, judgments: 值得跟=2, 观察中=3, 短热噪音=1, 需要补证据=3, sum=9
Page loaded successfully, no JS errors
4 product line cards: 项链/吊坠, 耳饰, 戒指, 手串/叠戴
28 evidence entries in #evidence-wall
4 product lines: 项链/吊坠, 耳饰, 戒指, 手串/叠戴

steps.action: Check console errors on all 5 pages
steps.expected: No JS errors on any page
steps.observed: No JS errors on any of the 5 pages

assertions.title: Zero-evidence direction shows meaningful empty state

steps.action: Load direction-detail.html?id=dir_001 and inspect evidence rendering code
steps.expected: Code handles zero-evidence case with Chinese empty state message
steps.observed: Code at line 643 checks evidenceEntries.length === 0 and renders '暂无相关证据。'

steps.action: Simulate zero-evidence state via JavaScript eval on evidence container
steps.expected: '暂无相关证据' message displayed, no JS error, no empty grid
steps.observed: Evidence section shows '暂无相关证据。' in a styled card, no empty grid, no JS error
No JS errors

assertions.issues: Note: All directions in both datasets have evidence. Tested by simulating empty evidence via JS eval to trigger the code path (confirmed code at direction-detail.html line 643 handles evidenceEntries.length === 0). The empty state message '暂无相关证据。' renders correctly in a card component.

assertions.title: Data load failure shows user-visible error

steps.expected: Chinese error message instead of blank page
steps.observed: Page shows '❌ 数据加载失败' with message '无法加载仪表盘数据。请检查数据文件是否存在，或稍后重试。' and '错误信息: HTTP error! status: 404' with 重新加载 button

steps.expected: Chinese error message instead of blank page
steps.observed: Page shows '❌ 数据加载失败' with message '无法加载证据库数据。请检查数据文件是否存在，或稍后重试。' and '错误信息: HTTP error! status: 404' with 返回首页 button
No unhandled JS errors (error is caught and displayed to user)

frictions.description: All directions in both datasets have evidence entries, making VAL-BRIDGE-036 impossible to test naturally. Had to simulate the empty state via JavaScript eval to verify the code path.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser eval to clear evidence container and confirmed the empty state message renders correctly. Also verified source code (direction-detail.html line 643) handles evidenceEntries.length === 0 correctly.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 6 passed, 0 failed. All frontend bug fix validations confirm correct behavior — 4 judgment states rendered on homepage, dynamic product lines on direction detail, graceful error handling for invalid IDs and missing data, jade backward compatibility on all 5 pages, and zero-evidence empty state.
